refnamediv.refpurpose: Return a specified geography value from Well-Known Text representation or extended (WKT).

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns a geography object from the well-known text or extended well-known representation. SRID 4326 is assumed if unspecified. This is an alias for ST_GeographyFromText. Points are always expressed in long lat form.

refsection.title: Examples
